prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/322-sheet.numbers in Numbers. Freeze the first (header) row so it stays visible while scrolling. (Format sidebar > Table > Headers & Footer > set Header Rows to 1 if needed, then choose Freeze Header Rows; or Table menu > Freeze Header Rows.) Save. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'numbers freeze_row ~/Desktop/kinbench/322-sheet.numbers "Sheet 1" 1'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/322-freeze-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
